creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello,

First of all thanks for taking the time to report this issue and using
FreeBSD!

Please try to obtain the information as mentioned in
http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/developers-handbook/kerndebug.html
because sadly this is not very informative for what we need to get this
resolved.

Thanks,
Remko

-- 
Kind regards,

     Remko Lodder               ** remko@elvandar.org
     FreeBSD                    ** remko@FreeBSD.org

     /* Quis custodiet ipsos custodes */
